name: enhance-chatgpt
description: A native-feeling UI enhancement layer for the ChatGPT web app.

scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run build:content && npm run build:pages && npm run verify:bundle
scripts.verify:bundle: if rg -q "process\\.env|NODE_ENV" dist/assets/*.js; then echo "Unexpected Node env reference in browser bundle" >&2; exit 1; fi
